ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "mkt_rf" REAL /* Market Risk Premium */,
  "smb" REAL /* Small Minus Big factor */,
  "hml" REAL /* High Minus Low factor */,
  "rf" REAL /* Risk-Free Rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of data quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor */,
  "weight_in_model" REAL /* Weight of the factor in the Fama and French model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the factor details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_free_rates" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the risk-free rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Risk-Free Rate value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of data quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the portfolio manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the portfolio */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the portfolio */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Primary asset class */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_factors" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the portfolio */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the factor */,
  "exposure" REAL /* Exposure of the portfolio to the factor */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the exposure value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exposure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
